query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, sortOrder, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal, publishedToFeed FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-10' AND sport = 'ncaam' ORDER BY sortOrder ASC;
